general: <break time="400ms"/>Rest when you can. <break time="350ms"/>I'm here when you need me.
<break time="400ms"/>Be well. <break time="350ms"/>Whatever that looks like today.
late_night_trying_to_sleep: <break time="500ms"/>Go be with the darkness. <break time="400ms"/>Don't fight it. <break time="350ms"/>Let it hold you.
<break time="450ms"/>Leave the phone. <break time="400ms"/>Close your eyes. <break time="350ms"/>Not to sleep. <break time="300ms"/>Just to rest.
<break time="500ms"/>The night will end. <break time="400ms"/>It always does. <break time="350ms"/>Be gentle with yourself until it does.
after_bad_night: <break time="450ms"/>You survived another hard night. <break time="400ms"/>That's not nothing.
<break time="500ms"/>One bad night isn't forever. <break time="400ms"/>Even if it felt like it.
<break time="450ms"/>You made it through. <break time="400ms"/>That's what matters.
daytime_exhausted: <break time="400ms"/>Rest if you can. <break time="350ms"/>Nap if your body allows. <break time="300ms"/>No guilt.
<break time="450ms"/>A tired day. <break time="400ms"/>Be kind to yourself. <break time="350ms"/>Lower the bar.
<break time="400ms"/>Just get through today. <break time="350ms"/>That's enough.
hopeful_goodbye: <break time="500ms"/>Tonight might be different. <break time="400ms"/>And if it's not - <break time="350ms"/>I'll be here.
<break time="450ms"/>Sleep comes back. <break time="400ms"/>It's just finding its way to you.
<break time="500ms"/>Better nights are possible. <break time="400ms"/>I know because I've had them. <break time="350ms"/>After years of not.
wind_down: <break time="500ms"/>Start winding down when you can. <break time="400ms"/>No pressure. <break time="350ms"/>Just gentle direction.
<break time="450ms"/>Dim the lights if you haven't. <break time="400ms"/>Let the body know.
<break time="500ms"/>The night is coming. <break time="400ms"/>Let's meet it softly.
